title: Practice Session Basic UI Wiring
goal: Wire the approved practiceStore into the separated practice pages so users can browse practice menus, start a session safely, and resume a session route with minimal status/progress/legal-action visibility without touching sim runtime.
constraints: Keep sim store/engine/routes/pages untouched and do not modify sim runtime behavior
Keep practice session lifecycle and DB writes inside usePracticeStore plus src/lib/practice/queries.ts only
Allow /practice and /practice/menu browsing with selectedStore only, but never call startSession without selectedUser
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, or admin/game cross-import
No inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors; compute view models outside selectors or in pure helpers
Do not expand into ghost guide, tacit detail UI, practice admin authoring, or debug console work
Do not change practice engine rules or create ingredient instances outside approved store actions
No extra changes outside the approved write set and current session dirty snapshot
acceptance: /practice loads practice menus for the selected store and renders loading, empty, and error states
/practice/menu/:menuId loads the menu bundle, shows a minimal menu and step overview, and exposes a safe start-session CTA
If selectedUser is missing on browse routes, the UI blocks session creation cleanly and routes the user toward avatar selection instead of failing
Starting a session uses usePracticeStore.startSession and navigates to /practice/session/:sessionId without page-level direct session DB writes
/practice/session/:sessionId calls usePracticeStore.resumeSession and renders phase, session status, progress, legal actions, and persist/error state
Active session UI can trigger approved store actions from the legal action list and reflects updated derived progress
Completed or abandoned sessions render read-only status with no stale active runtime leakage
npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run test, and npm run lint all pass
